ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "fips5" TEXT /* FIPS code of the county */,
  "totalpop" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "countbelow200pct" INTEGER /* Number of people below 200% of the poverty line */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the county */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income in the county */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "estab" INTEGER /* Number of establishments in the county */,
  "popsize_bin" TEXT /* Population size bin */,
  "business_per_emp" REAL /* Business performance per employee */,
  "z_business" REAL /* Z-score for business performance */,
  "business_ptile" INTEGER /* Percentile for business performance */,
  "business_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for business performance */,
  "business_ptile_overall" INTEGER /* Overall percentile for business performance */,
  "business_rank_overall" INTEGER /* Overall rank for business performance */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the county */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* Year-over-year growth rate of the GDP */,
  "average_wage" REAL /* Average wage in the county */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the county */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "housing_per_pov_200" REAL /* Number of housing units per 200% poverty level */,
  "z_housing" REAL /* Z-score for housing units */,
  "housing_ptile" INTEGER /* Percentile for housing units */,
  "housing_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for housing units */,
  "housing_ptile_overall" INTEGER /* Overall percentile for housing units */,
  "housing_rank_overall" INTEGER /* Overall rank for housing units */,
  "average_home_value" REAL /* Average value of homes in the county */,
  "affordability_index" REAL /* Housing affordability index */,
  "vacancy_rate" REAL /* Vacancy rate for housing units */,
  "median_rent" REAL /* Median rent in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_finance_data" (
  "impact_finance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact finance data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "impact_finance_per_pov_200" REAL /* Impact finance per 200% poverty level */,
  "z_impact_finance" REAL /* Z-score for impact finance */,
  "impact_finance_ptile" INTEGER /* Percentile for impact finance */,
  "impact_finance_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for impact finance */,
  "impact_finance_ptile_overall" INTEGER /* Overall percentile for impact finance */,
  "impact_finance_rank_overall" INTEGER /* Overall rank for impact finance */,
  "total_investment" REAL /* Total investment in impact projects */,
  "number_of_investors" INTEGER /* Number of investors in impact projects */,
  "average_investment_per_project" REAL /* Average investment per impact project */,
  "return_on_investment" REAL /* Return on investment for impact projects */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_finance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_finance_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_development_data" (
  "community_dev_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community development data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "comm_dev_other_per_pov_200" REAL /* Community development projects per 200% poverty level */,
  "z_comm_dev_other" REAL /* Z-score for community development */,
  "comm_dev_other_ptile" INTEGER /* Percentile for community development */,
  "comm_dev_other_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for community development */,
  "comm_dev_other_ptile_overall" INTEGER /* Overall percentile for community development */,
  "comm_dev_other_rank_overall" INTEGER /* Overall rank for community development */,
  "number_of_projects" INTEGER /* Total number of community development projects */,
  "total_funding" REAL /* Total funding allocated to community development projects */,
  "average_funding_per_project" REAL /* Average funding per community development project */,
  "project_completion_rate" REAL /* Rate of project completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_dev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_community_development_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "global_capacity_data" (
  "global_capacity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each global capacity data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "z_global_capacity" REAL /* Z-score for global capacity */,
  "global_capacity_ptile" INTEGER /* Percentile for global capacity */,
  "global_capacity_rank" INTEGER /* Rank for global capacity */,
  "global_capacity_ptile_overall" INTEGER /* Overall percentile for global capacity */,
  "global_capacity_rank_overall" INTEGER /* Overall rank for global capacity */,
  "total_workforce" INTEGER /* Total workforce in the county */,
  "skilled_workforce_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of skilled workforce */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level of the workforce */,
  "innovation_index" REAL /* Index measuring innovation and technological advancement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("global_capacity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_global_capacity_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "core_logic_data" (
  "core_logic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CoreLogic data entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "core_logic_200pov" REAL /* CoreLogic data for 200% poverty level */,
  "property_tax_rate" REAL /* Property tax rate in the county */,
  "foreclosure_rate" REAL /* Foreclosure rate in the county */,
  "homeownership_rate" REAL /* Homeownership rate in the county */,
  "median_days_on_market" INTEGER /* Median number of days homes are on the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("core_logic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_core_logic_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
